source: G3 MVP-02 演化结晶 - 时事热点高冲击力

color_palette.description: 黑白红新闻纪实: 黑#1A1A1A+白#F8F6F0+红#E04F5F强调

prompt_keywords: documentary photography, photojournalism, candid moment, high ISO grain, natural lighting, split-screen, dramatic contrast
negative_keywords: 3D render, cartoon, illustration, flat design, bright colors
style_constraint_cn: 新闻纪实风: 纪实摄影+大标题叠层+单色强调
style_constraint_en: News documentary ONLY. Photojournalism with headline overlay. Black/white/red palette.
meta_prompt: documentary photojournalism, split-screen 60% photo 40% text, headline overlay, black #1A1A1A white #F8F6F0 red #E04F5F, serif headline 36pt
prompt_example: Hook section, documentary photography, photojournalism style, split-screen 60% photo top 40% text panel bottom, large bold headline overlay on photo, red #E04F5F accent, serif typography. --ar 16:9 --s 400 --style raw
